title: 300 DPI Cheat Sheet — Every Etsy Print Size and Its Pixel Dimensions
description: The formula: inches × 300 = pixels needed. 4×6 = 1200×1800px (2:3). 8×10 = 2400×3000px (4:5). 12×16 = 3600×4800px (3:4). 16×20 = 4800×6000px (4:5). A4 = 2480×3508px (ISO). A3 = 3508×4961px (ISO). SnapToSize handles all of this in one upload — every ratio, every size, 300 DPI.
